_meta.derivation: earliest commit per author_login from commits.json; enrich via /commits/{sha} for files/stats

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+# aruco_opencv
+A ROS package for ArUco marker detection using opencv libraries

data.author: DLu
data.message:
Update deprecated call to ament_target_dependencies (#51)

* [kilted] Update deprecated call to ament_target_dependencies

* Fix targets

data.author: mergify[bot]
data.message:
Add an option to subscribe to compressed image topics. (#28) (#30)

* Add an option to subscribe compressed image topics

Also allow for relative names in cam_base_topic

* Fix code style divergence reported by colcon test

* Properly forward the original header when decompressing image messages.

* Update aruco_opencv/src/aruco_tracker.cpp

Co-authored-by: Błażej Sowa <bsowa123@gmail.com>

* Update aruco_opencv/src/aruco_tracker.cpp

Co-authored-by: Błażej Sowa <bsowa123@gmail.com>

* Restructure image callbacks

* Remove the unnecessary 'copy elision' comment

* Reset compressed_img_sub_ in on_shutdown()

---------

Co-authored-by: Błażej Sowa <bsowa123@gmail.com>
(cherry picked from commit 1150e04599bdc6896ec211c291493bff3f3b4dcb)

Co-authored-by: Ray Ferric <63957587+rayferric@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,7 @@
 
     marker_dict: 4X4_50
 
+    image_sub_compressed: false
     image_sub_qos:
       reliability: 2 # 0 - system default, 1 - reliable, 2 - best effort
       durability: 2 # 0 - system default, 1 - transient local, 2 - volatile
